overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a long dark coat and hat walking along a snow-covered railway track through a mountainous winter landscape. The character walks steadily through a narrow pass between a stone wall and wooden fence, eventually stopping to look up at the snow-capped peaks as golden sunset light illuminates the clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered railway track through mountain pass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered railway track between a stone wall and wooden fence, heading toward distant mountains

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the railway track in the same direction

entered.detail: snow-covered railway tracks with wooden sleepers running parallel to the path
tall stone block wall supporting the rocky cliff beside the tracks
dark wooden fence or barrier along the left edge of the path
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks under partly cloudy sky
steep rocky cliff with patches of snow rising above the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a snow-covered railway track cutting through a mountain pass. A stone retaining wall runs along the right side against a steep rocky cliff, while a wooden fence lines the left. In the distance, snow-capped mountains rise under a partly cloudy sky, and a small figure can be seen walking far ahead on the tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain railway overlook with dramatic sunset vista

events.description: character stops walking and camera tilts upward to reveal the mountain vista
golden hour sunlight becomes prominent as camera angle shifts to capture the sunset-lit clouds

agents.ego_description: stopping on the railway track and looking up at the mountain peaks and golden sky

entered.detail: dramatic clouds illuminated with golden and orange hues from the setting sun
waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face visible when looking upward

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and the camera tilts upward to reveal a breathtaking view of the snow-capped mountains against a dramatic golden-hour sky. The wooden fence falls out of view as the perspective shifts to focus on the towering rocky cliffs, a small waterfall, and the warm orange clouds illuminated by the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a steady trek through a narrow mountain pass and culminates in a sweeping vista of the surrounding peaks. It begins by tracking a character walking along a snow-covered railway track, flanked by a stone retaining wall on the right and a wooden fence on the left. As the character comes to a halt, the camera tilts upward, causing the fence to fall out of view while the perspective shifts toward the towering rocky cliffs. The scene then expands to reveal a small waterfall and the immense scale of the snow-capped mountains, finally settling on a dramatic golden-hour sky filled with warm orange clouds illuminated by the setting sun.
